'''鈭歞h-y-b''' ('''dhayaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:allatrate|allatrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-y-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:allatrate|allatrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-y-b
|-
! Lemma
| dhayaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhayabithi|dhayabithi]] || [[word:dhayabiji|dhayabiji]] || [[word:dhayabishi|dhayabishi]] || [[word:dhayabi|dhayabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhayabuthuth|dhayabuthuth]] || [[word:dhayabujuj|dhayabujuj]] || [[word:dhayabushush|dhayabushush]] || [[word:dhayab|dhayab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhayabuthu|dhayabuthu]] || [[word:dhayabuju|dhayabuju]] || [[word:dhayabushu|dhayabushu]] || [[word:dhayabu|dhayabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhayabufuth|dhayabufuth]] || [[word:dhayabufuj|dhayabufuj]] || [[word:dhayabufush|dhayabufush]] || [[word:dhayabuf|dhayabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhayabethe|dhayabethe]] || [[word:dhayabeje|dhayabeje]] || [[word:dhayabeshe|dhayabeshe]] || [[word:dhayabe|dhayabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhayabothoth|dhayabothoth]] || [[word:dhayabojoj|dhayabojoj]] || [[word:dhayaboshosh|dhayaboshosh]] || [[word:dhayab|dhayab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhayabotho|dhayabotho]] || [[word:dhayabojo|dhayabojo]] || [[word:dhayabosho|dhayabosho]] || [[word:dhayabo|dhayabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhayabofoth|dhayabofoth]] || [[word:dhayabofoj|dhayabofoj]] || [[word:dhayabofosh|dhayabofosh]] || [[word:dhayabof|dhayabof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhayab忙th忙|dhayab忙th忙]] || [[word:dhayab忙j忙|dhayab忙j忙]] || [[word:dhayab忙sh忙|dhayab忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhayab忙|dhayab忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhayabathath|dhayabathath]] || [[word:dhayabajaj|dhayabajaj]] || [[word:dhayabashash|dhayabashash]] || [[word:dhayab|dhayab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhayabatha|dhayabatha]] || [[word:dhayabaja|dhayabaja]] || [[word:dhayabasha|dhayabasha]] || [[word:dhayaba|dhayaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhayabafath|dhayabafath]] || [[word:dhayabafaj|dhayabafaj]] || [[word:dhayabafash|dhayabafash]] || [[word:dhayabaf|dhayabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhayabasha|dhayabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhayabasha|godhayabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhayabasha|gokidhayabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhayabn眉sha|dhayabn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhayabnkn眉sha|godhayabnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhayabn眉sha|gokidhayabn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhayabsh毛sha|dhayabsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhayabnksh毛sha|godhayabnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhayabsh毛sha|gokidhayabsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhayabrosha|dhayabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhayabnkrosha|godhayabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhayabrosha|gokidhayabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhayabmusha|dhayabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhayabnkmusha|godhayabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhayabmusha|gokidhayabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhayabsherasha|dhayabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhayabnksherasha|godhayabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhayabsherasha|gokidhayabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhayabngasha|dhayabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhayabnkngasha|godhayabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhayabngasha|gokidhayabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhayabyasha|dhayabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhayabnkyasha|godhayabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhayabyasha|gokidhayabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhayabyamasha|dhayabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhayabnkyamasha|godhayabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhayabyamasha|gokidhayabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhayabn眉sh毛sha|dhayabn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhayabnkn眉sh毛sha|godhayabnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhayabn眉sh毛sha|gokidhayabn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhayabn眉rosha|dhayabn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhayabnkn眉rosha|godhayabnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhayabn眉rosha|gokidhayabn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhayabn眉musha|dhayabn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhayabnkn眉musha|godhayabnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhayabn眉musha|gokidhayabn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhayabsh毛n眉sha|dhayabsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhayabnksh毛n眉sha|godhayabnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhayabsh毛n眉sha|gokidhayabsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhayabsh毛rosha|dhayabsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhayabnksh毛rosha|godhayabnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhayabsh毛rosha|gokidhayabsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhayabsh毛musha|dhayabsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhayabnksh毛musha|godhayabnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhayabsh毛musha|gokidhayabsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhayabron眉sha|dhayabron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhayabnkron眉sha|godhayabnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhayabron眉sha|gokidhayabron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhayabrosh毛sha|dhayabrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhayabnkrosh毛sha|godhayabnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhayabrosh毛sha|gokidhayabrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhayabromusha|dhayabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhayabnkromusha|godhayabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhayabromusha|gokidhayabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhayabmun眉sha|dhayabmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhayabnkmun眉sha|godhayabnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhayabmun眉sha|gokidhayabmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhayabmush毛sha|dhayabmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhayabnkmush毛sha|godhayabnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhayabmush毛sha|gokidhayabmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhayabmurosha|dhayabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhayabnkmurosha|godhayabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhayabmurosha|gokidhayabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhayab|dhayab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙y忙b|dh忙y忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhayab|hodhayab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙y忙b|hodh忙y忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhayab|hohodhayab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙y忙b|hohodh忙y忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhayab|n眉dhayab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙y忙b|n眉dh忙y忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhayab|n眉n眉dhayab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙y忙b|n眉n眉dh忙y忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhayab|n茂dhayab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙y忙b|n茂dh忙y忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhayab|n茂n茂dhayab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙y忙b|n茂n茂dh忙y忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhayab|ludhayab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙y忙b|ludh忙y忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhayab|luludhayab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙y忙b|luludh忙y忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhayab|lidhayab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙y忙b|lidh忙y忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhayab|lilidhayab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙y忙b|lilidh忙y忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhayab|kodhayab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙y忙b|kodh忙y忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhayab|kokodhayab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙y忙b|kokodh忙y忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhayab|kedhayab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙y忙b|kedh忙y忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhayab|kekedhayab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙y忙b|kekedh忙y忙b]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
